ModMetadata.Name: AIMeE Bug Fixes
ModMetadata.Author: FlorpyDorp
ModMetadata.Description:
This is a Plugin Mod. It requires BepInEx to be installed with the StationeersLaunchPad plugin. See: https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad
Fixes three bugs with the AIMeE mining robot:
1. Mine Deadlock: AIMeE stops mining after first ore in multiplayer because _mineCancellation.Initialized is never reset after Mine() completes. 2. Off-State Teleporting: When turned off but still receiving logic (IC10/transmitter), AIMeE hops into the air and teleports because TryUnstuck/PathToTarget have no OnOff guard. 3. Wheel Animation Desync: On dedicated servers, wheel animations don't play because AnimateAuthority() is gated by IsOccluded, which can be true on headless servers.
All fixes are server-side Harmony patches.
ModMetadata.ChangeLog: v0.1.0: Initial release - Fix mine deadlock (_mineCancellation reset after Mine completes) - Fix off-state teleporting (skip TryUnstuck/PathToTarget when off) - Fix wheel animation desync on dedicated server (AnimateAuthority bypasses occlusion)
ModMetadata.InGameDescription:
<size="30"><color=#ffa500>AIMeE Bug Fixes</color></size> <color=#ff0000>This is a Plugin Mod. It requires BepInEx with StationeersLaunchPad.</color>
Fixes three AIMeE mining robot bugs:
<color=#ffa500>1. Mine Deadlock (Multiplayer)</color> AIMeE stops after first ore because the mining cancellation token is never reset.
<color=#ffa500>2. Off-State Teleporting</color> When off but receiving logic, AIMeE hops/teleports due to missing power guards.
<color=#ffa500>3. Wheel Animation Desync (Dedicated Server)</color> Wheel animations frozen on clients because server skips AnimateAuthority when occluded.
All fixes are server-side Harmony patches.
